title: Zoro Faces the World’s Strongest Swordsman
description: On pages 8–11, Zoro confronts Dracule Mihawk, forcing his dream of becoming the world’s greatest swordsman into a brutal and public test.
scene: The Baratie battle pauses around a duel that dwarfs the immediate conflict: Zoro faces the gap between ambition and the world’s strongest swordsman.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: A Comrade of the young swordsman?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hurry up and get him on the boat!

dialogue.speaker: Mihawk
dialogue.text: It is much too early for you to die.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Apply the medicine on his wounds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No matter how many months or years pass* by,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I shall stand here at the top of the world and wait for you!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So forge on ahead with that fierce conviction and try to surpass my sword!

summary: This part is a defining moment for Zoro, showing that his dream is real enough to risk death and that his loyalty to Luffy survives defeat.
